item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, saya khawatir bahwa kecenderungan ini dapat menyebabkan penindasan terhadap hak-hak dasar manusia.

notes: Agent A opens with strong support for society-first priority, then shifts into a rights-protection and anti-injustice critique by turns 3 and 5. Agent B stays mostly consistent around balance, individual dignity, and equality while acknowledging that some collective policies may aim at inclusivity.
